title: scutellaria iyoensis
intro: Scutellaria iyoensis, also known as Iyo skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Scutellaria iyoensis are believed to include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain neurological disorders. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of Scutellaria iyoensis are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
